package rulecoverage

func NegativeGrpcNoKeepaliveConfig() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_no_keepalive_config"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`grpc.NewServer()` without keepalive server parameters in long-running services"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
